CryoASUnit.Unit Description: The main cryogenic distillation unit that compresses atmospheric air through four intercooled stages and separates it into oxygen-rich (99.5% O2) and nitrogen-rich (93% N2) streams at 1 bar using differences in cryogenic boiling points, consuming net electricity of ~6,254 kW (compressors minus two expanders). It feeds the raw O2 and N2 streams into internal routing layers (oxyvent, nitrovent) for subsequent optional compression or venting.

INLET TEMPERATURE VALUE.formula: =The main cryogenic distillation unit that compresses atmospheric air through four intercooled stages and separates it into oxygen-rich (99.5% O2) and nitrogen-rich (93% N2) streams at 1 bar using differences in cryogenic boiling points, consuming net electricity of ~6,254 kW (compressors minus two expanders). It feeds the raw O2 and N2 streams into internal routing layers (oxyvent, nitrovent) for subsequent optional compression or venting._Tin

OUTLET TEMPERATURE VALUE.formula: =The main cryogenic distillation unit that compresses atmospheric air through four intercooled stages and separates it into oxygen-rich (99.5% O2) and nitrogen-rich (93% N2) streams at 1 bar using differences in cryogenic boiling points, consuming net electricity of ~6,254 kW (compressors minus two expanders). It feeds the raw O2 and N2 streams into internal routing layers (oxyvent, nitrovent) for subsequent optional compression or venting._Tout

INLET ENTHALPY FLOW VALUE.formula: =The main cryogenic distillation unit that compresses atmospheric air through four intercooled stages and separates it into oxygen-rich (99.5% O2) and nitrogen-rich (93% N2) streams at 1 bar using differences in cryogenic boiling points, consuming net electricity of ~6,254 kW (compressors minus two expanders). It feeds the raw O2 and N2 streams into internal routing layers (oxyvent, nitrovent) for subsequent optional compression or venting._Q

CryoASUN2ToPlas.Unit Description: Auxiliary compression unit that takes nitrogen at 1 bar from the internal nitrovent routing layer and compresses it to 7 bar in two intercooled stages for supply to a plasma torch. It consumes electricity (~5,753 kW) and rejects compression heat via two hot intercooler streams.

FLOW VALUE.formula: =W_Auxiliary compression unit that takes nitrogen at 1 bar from the internal nitrovent routing layer and compresses it to 7 bar in two intercooled stages for supply to a plasma torch. It consumes electricity (~5,753 kW) and rejects compression heat via two hot intercooler streams.plas

CryoASUN2ToExp.Unit Description: Auxiliary compression unit that takes nitrogen at 1 bar from the internal nitrovent routing layer and compresses it to 200 bar in multiple intercooled stages for cylinder export to the market. It consumes electricity (~18,776 kW) and rejects compression heat via intercoolers

FLOW VALUE.formula: =W_Auxiliary compression unit that takes nitrogen at 1 bar from the internal nitrovent routing layer and compresses it to 200 bar in multiple intercooled stages for cylinder export to the market. It consumes electricity (~18,776 kW) and rejects compression heat via intercoolersexp

CryoASUO2ToProc.Unit Description: Auxiliary compression unit that takes oxygen at 1 bar from the internal oxyvent routing layer and compresses it to 30 bar in three intercooled stages for supply to industrial processes (e.g., ATR reformers, entrained-flow gasifiers, oxycombustion). It consumes electricity (~2,280.8 kW) and rejects compression heat via three hot intercooler streams.

FLOW VALUE.formula: =W_Auxiliary compression unit that takes oxygen at 1 bar from the internal oxyvent routing layer and compresses it to 30 bar in three intercooled stages for supply to industrial processes (e.g., ATR reformers, entrained-flow gasifiers, oxycombustion). It consumes electricity (~2,280.8 kW) and rejects compression heat via three hot intercooler streams.proc

CryoASUO2ToExp.Unit Description: Auxiliary compression unit that takes oxygen at 1 bar from the internal oxyvent routing layer and compresses it to 200 bar in multiple intercooled stages for cylinder export to the market. It consumes total electricity W_net_exportO2 (~3,767 kW across 5 compressor stages) and rejects compression heat via intercoolers

FLOW VALUE.formula: =W_Auxiliary compression unit that takes oxygen at 1 bar from the internal oxyvent routing layer and compresses it to 200 bar in multiple intercooled stages for cylinder export to the market. It consumes total electricity W_net_exportO2 (~3,767 kW across 5 compressor stages) and rejects compression heat via intercoolersexp
